# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

(Stamps: HAND DELIVERED; Legislative Resource Center; 2019 FEB 15 AM 9:13; For Official Use Only)

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna
**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631

[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
[ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ____ (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** [ ] Initial Report  [X] Amendment
**Date of Report Being Amended:** January 10, 2019

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

The transaction grid contains only the standard greyed example row (ignored): *Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock* — JT, Sale (X), Date 02/05/015, Date Notified 03/07/15, Amount col B ($15,001-$50,000).

The filer's actual transactions are noted as **"Please see the attached"** (attached table on page 2).
